meta.title: 社交媒体
meta.description: Intermediate social media vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: liking, following, influencers, and 不但〜而且〜 patterns.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급~중급 소셜미디어 어휘와 문형: 좋아요, 팔로우, 인플루언서, 不但〜而且〜 구문.

explanation.en: 「点赞」(diǎnzàn) means "to like [a social media post]".

questions.prompt: 「点赞」是什么意思？(What does 点赞 mean?)

explanation.en: 「关注」(guānzhù) means "to follow [an account]" in a social media context.

questions.prompt: 「关注」在社交媒体上是什么意思？(What does 关注 mean on social media?)
「网红」是什么意思？(What does 网红 mean?)

explanation.en: 「刷屏」(shuāpíng) means "to flood one's social media feed" (repeatedly refreshing/posting).
explanation.ko: 「刷屏」(shuāpíng)는 소셜미디어 피드를 반복적으로 새로고침/도배한다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「刷屏」是什么意思？(What does 刷屏 mean?)
「隐私」是什么意思？(What does 隐私 mean?)
我很喜欢这张照片，给它___了。(I really like this photo, I gave it a like.)
我___了这位作家，因为她的文章写得很好。(I followed this writer because her articles are very well written.)
这位___在网上非常有名，有上千万粉丝。(This influencer is very famous online, has tens of millions of followers.)
这条新闻在网上___了，大家都在讨论。(This news flooded social media, everyone is discussing it.)
在网上分享照片的时候，要注意保护自己的___。(When sharing photos online, be careful to protect your own privacy.)
这条视频___了几百万次，非常受欢迎。(This video has been shared millions of times, very popular.)
不但很多人点赞，___很多人留言评论。(Not only did many people like it, but also many people left comments.)
如果你不喜欢这个人发的内容，可以选择___他。(If you don't like this person's posts, you can choose to unfollow them.)

explanation.en: 「在」marks the location/platform: 在社交媒体上 = "on social media".
explanation.ko: 「在」는 장소/플랫폼을 나타내며 '在社交媒体上'은 '소셜미디어에서'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 越来越多的人___社交媒体上花太多时间。(More and more people spend too much time on social media.)
我一___打开手机，就忍不住看社交媒体。(As soon as I turn on my phone, I can't resist checking social media.)
这个平台___了很多虚假信息，需要加强监管。(This platform has spread a lot of false information, needs stronger regulation.)
过度使用社交媒体可能会___心理健康。(Excessive use of social media might harm mental health.)

explanation.en: 「包装」(bāozhuāng) here figuratively means "to package/present [an image]".

questions.prompt: 很多人在社交媒体上___自己的生活，展示美好的一面。(Many people package their lives on social media, showing only the good side.)

explanation.en: 「不违反」means "not violate"; here the blank should be 「违反」with 不 already implied by context — actually check: sentence pattern 只要〜不〜就〜 requires 违反 for correct negative meaning.
explanation.ko: 이 문장은 '규정을 위반하지 않는 한'이라는 뜻으로 「违反」가 적절하다.

questions.prompt: 只要发布的内容___规定，就不会被平台删除。(As long as the posted content doesn't violate the rules, it won't be deleted by the platform.)
这位网红因为发表不当言论，___了很多粉丝。(This influencer lost many followers because of making inappropriate remarks.)

explanation.en: 「了」should appear only once at the end; repeating it (了了) is incorrect.
explanation.ko: 「了」는 문장 끝에 한 번만 와야 하며 '了了'처럼 중복되면 오류이다.

questions.prompt: 我很喜欢这张照片，给它点赞了了。(I really like this photo, I gave it a like.) — find the error
choices: 我很喜欢这张照片，给它点赞了。
我很喜欢这张照片，给它点赞了了。
我很喜欢这张照片，给它了点赞了。
我很喜欢这张照片，点赞给它了。

explanation.en: 「而且」must come at the start of the second clause, before 很多人: 而且很多人〜 (not 很多人而且〜).
explanation.ko: 「而且」는 두 번째 절의 맨 앞, '很多人' 앞에 와야 하므로 '而且很多人〜'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 不但很多人点赞，很多人而且留言评论。(Not only did many people like it, but also many people left comments.) — find the error
choices: 不但很多人点赞，而且很多人留言评论。
不但很多人点赞，很多人而且留言评论。
不但很多人点赞，而且留言评论很多人。
很多人不但点赞，而且很多人留言评论。

explanation.en: 「就」must come right before the second verb phrase 忍不住看社交媒体, after the comma, not attached to 打开手机.
explanation.ko: 「就」는 쉼표 뒤, 두 번째 동사구 '忍不住看社交媒体' 바로 앞에 와야 하며 '打开手机'에 붙어서는 안 된다.

questions.prompt: 我一打开手机就，忍不住看社交媒体。(As soon as I turn on my phone, I can't resist checking social media.) — find the error
choices: 我一打开手机，就忍不住看社交媒体。
我一打开手机就，忍不住看社交媒体。
我打开一手机，就忍不住看社交媒体。
我一打开手机，忍不住就看社交媒体。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 我很喜欢这张照片，给它点赞了 ("I really like this photo, I gave it a like").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '我很喜欢这张照片，给它点赞了' (이 사진이 정말 마음에 들어서 좋아요를 눌렀다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 我很喜欢这张照片，__________。(I really like this photo, I gave it a like.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 不但很多人点赞，而且很多人留言评论 ("Not only did many people like it, but also many people left comments").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '不但很多人点赞，而且很多人留言评论' (많은 사람이 좋아요를 눌렀을 뿐만 아니라 많은 사람이 댓글도 남겼다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 不但很多人点赞，__________。(Not only did many people like it, but also many people left comments.)
